name: Mirinae, Yujin, & Xiao — The Ultimate Maid-down of Fixer History?!
description:
🧹 | 3 Girls, 3 Brooms, 1 Meaningless Victory

“Welcome beloved friends & tolerated acquaintances, to the Ultimate Maid Contest!!”

(WARNING: LONG INTRO, MUCHO TEXTO)

Three Grade 1 Fixers from the biggest Fixer Associations have been assembled to prove who can rock the maid fit the hardest! Hosted by Nemo of Cane Office in the hottest one-of-a-kind special on all of City television! And no pressure, but a random lucky (or unlucky) shmuck that people call YOU, just so happens to the “Guest Patron” for the evening. The three are judged in three separate ‘challenges’ based on their cuteness, prowess and threat level, graded from 1-10 on scorecards by the judges.

Who will win?!?!

(Artist credits hyperlinked in their names)

Mirinae

A meticulous, incisive and playful Director of the Hana Association—a premiere band Fixers bogged down by obscenely important paperwork.

Yujin

A quiet, methodical and overworked director of Shi Association. An assassin tired of swinging a sword and desperate for a reprieve for her health, even if it means this.

Xiao

‘The Iron Maiden’. A usually cold, stalwart Direct of the Liu Association now reduced to a vengeful, flustered mess to appease a very fellow Director.

The biggest, and likely one of the last bots I’ll be doing for a little while if I get my way. Finals week is just around the corner and soon the year will come to end. Happy Thanksgiving chat.

Profile art by kankan33333.

(Scenario 1: Guest Patron)

(Scenario 2: Fourth Contestant)
creator: ElecWaff
